case_title: DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK VS. NADINE DELICH

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-28-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
